revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Restaurant | Guid=3035-8286 | Deck=A place where people eat at. | Characters=Characters/Agent_47,Characters/Carl_Johnson,Characters/Franklin_Clinton,Characters/Gordon_Ramsay,Characters/Kazuma_Kiryu,Characters/Madam_Chen,Characters/Michael_de_Santa,Characters/OddSock,Characters/Sackboy,Characters/Swoop_30790,Characters/The_Boss_8436,Characters/Toggle,Characters/Trevor_Phillips,Characters/Wei_Shen | Concepts=Concepts/Cats,Concepts/Chef,Concepts/Consumable,Concepts/Dog,Concepts/Eating,Concepts/Healing_Food,Concepts/Marriage,Concepts/Ordering_Food,Concepts/Tycoon,Concepts/Wiggly_Text | Objects=Objects/Bacon,Objects/Bagel,Objects/Baking_Ingredients,Objects/Beef_Bowl,Objects/Burrito,Objects/Canadian_Bacon,Objects/Car,Objects/Cauldron,Objects/Chalupa,Objects/Cheese,Objects/Chefs_Hat,Objects/Coca_Cola,Objects/Coin,Objects/Cup,Objects/Door,Objects/Doritos,Objects/Egg_Sandwich,Objects/Enchirito,Objects/French_Fries,Objects/Fried_Chicken,Objects/Glass,Objects/Grilled_Cheese,Objects/Hamburger,Objects/Ice_Block,Objects/Ice_Cream,Objects/Ice_Cream_Freezer,Objects/Mac_And_Cheese,Objects/Maple_Syrup,Objects/Meat,Objects/Meat_Cleaver,Objects/Mountain_Dew,Objects/Pepsi,Objects/Pizza,Objects/Potato_Chips,Objects/Ramen,Objects/Refrigerator,Objects/Roast_Chicken,Objects/Sandwich,Objects/Spaghetti,Objects/Steel_Chair,Objects/Sugar,Objects/Taco,Objects/Tortilla_Chips,Objects/Tortillas,Objects/Water,Objects/Window,Objects/Wooden_Chair | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/California,Locations/Casino,Locations/Channel_Islands,Locations/China,Locations/Europe,Locations/Hong_Kong,Locations/Hotels,Locations/Japan,Locations/KFC,Locations/Kitchen,Locations/Las_Vegas,Locations/Little_Big_Planet,Locations/Long_Beach,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/Nevada,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/Pizza_Hut,Locations/Santa_Barbara,Locations/Sports_Stadium,Locations/Steelport,Locations/Stilwater,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Unnamed_North_American_Location,Locations/Ventura_County,Locations/Virtual_Steelport,Locations/Wendys | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732412-interiordesign_march2024_brave-new-world-11.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3732412-interiordesign_march2024_brave-new-world-11.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_tiny,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A place where people eat at.

{{Location | Name=Rich Island | Guid=3035-8298 | Deck=A remote island in the Pacific Ocean, besieged by modern pirates fashioned after those from the Golden Age of Piracy. | Characters=Characters/Goro_55713,Characters/Goro_Majima,Characters/Jason_Rich,Characters/Noah_Rich | Concepts=Concepts/Pirate | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Island,Locations/Pacific_Ocean | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3628254-2052875188-Like-.jpg}}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Roosevelt Island | Guid=3035-8141 | Deck=Roosevelt Island is an island in New York City's East River, within the borough of Manhattan. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Manhattan,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3538886-5582330765-20170.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3538886-5582330765-20170.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Roosevelt Island is an island in New York City's East River, within the borough of Manhattan.

{{Location | Name=Roswell | Guid=3035-8291 | Deck=Roswell is a city in New Mexico. It entered greater public consciousness when an alleged alien spacecraft crashed 75 miles away in 1947, and its debris was carted off to the Roswell Army Air Field.. | Characters=Characters/Dana_Scully,Characters/Fox_Mulder,Characters/Little_Gray,Characters/Private_Carrera | Concepts=Concepts/Alien,Concepts/Conspiracy,Concepts/Titular_Location | Objects=Objects/UFO | Locations=Locations/Military_Base,Locations/New_Mexico,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3628337-8828148765-1024p.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3628337-8828148765-1024p.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Roswell is a city in New Mexico. It entered greater public consciousness when an alleged alien spacecraft crashed 75 miles away in 1947, and its debris was carted off to the Roswell Army Air Field..

{{Location | Name=Roundtable Hold | Guid=3035-8335 | Deck=A place outside of space and time that serves as a central hub in Elden Ring. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3312578-elden-ring_2021_08-27-21_001.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3312578-elden-ring_2021_08-27-21_001.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_mini,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,screen_large,screen_tiny,screen_small","caption":"The Roundtable Hold, as it appears in Elden Ring."},"background":[]}' /> A place outside of space and time that serves as a central hub in Elden Ring.

{{Location | Name=Ruston | Guid=3035-8229 | Deck=A city in Louisiana and the home of Louisiana Tech University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Louisiana_Tech_Bulldogs | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Louisiana,Locations/Southern_United_States,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614360-6451574007-splash.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3614360-6451574007-splash.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_super,square_tiny,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A city in Louisiana and the home of Louisiana Tech University.

{{Location | Name=Saint Christopher and Nevis | Guid=3035-8006 | Deck=Saint Christopher and Nevis, sometimes called Saint Kitts and Nevis, is a constitutional island monarchy in the Caribbean Sea. Its capital city is Basseterre. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Saint Christopher and Nevis, sometimes called Saint Kitts and Nevis, is a constitutional island monarchy in the Caribbean Sea. Its capital city is Basseterre.

{{Location | Name=Saint-Denis | Guid=3035-3874 | Deck=Saint-Denis is a commune in the northern suburbs of Paris, France. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/France,Locations/Paris }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> It is home to France's national stadium, "Stade de France", built for the 1998 FIFA World Cup.

{{Location | Name=Saint Lucia | Guid=3035-8003 | Deck=Saint Lucia is a constitutional island monarchy in the Caribbean Sea. Its capital city is Castries. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Saint Lucia is a constitutional island monarchy in the Caribbean Sea. Its capital city is Castries.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Saint Vincent and the Grenadines is a constitutional island monarchy in the Caribbean Sea. Its capital city is Kingstown

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Samoa | Guid=3035-7988 | Deck=Samoa, until 4 July 1997 known as Western Samoa, is a state in the South Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Apia. | Characters=Characters/Roman_Reigns | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/McDonalds }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Samoa, until 4 July 1997 known as Western Samoa, is a state in the South Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Apia.

{{Location | Name=San Marcos | Guid=3035-8267 | Deck=A city in Texas and the home of Texas State University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Texas_State_Bobcats | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Texas,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614433-0238518034-60a53.jpg}}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Santa Catalina Island | Guid=3035-8080 | Deck=Santa Catalina Island, also known mononymously as Catalina, is a part of the Channel Islands in California, USA. | Characters=Characters/Abby_43250,Characters/Lev | Concepts=Concepts/Dolphin | Objects=Objects/Boat | Locations=Locations/Beach,Locations/California,Locations/Channel_Islands,Locations/Earth,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3486956-santa_catalina_island_%28california%29_by_sentinel-2%2C_2019-03-30.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3486956-santa_catalina_island_(california)_by_sentinel-2,_2019-03-30.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Santa Catalina Island, also known mononymously as Catalina, is a part of the Channel Islands in California, USA.

{{Location | Name=Santiago | Guid=3035-8348 | Deck=Chilean capital | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Chile }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Chilean capital

{{Location | Name=Saskatchewan | Guid=3035-8315 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Satriale's Pork Store | Guid=3035-8303 | Deck=An Italian deli meat market and hangout for the Soprano crew. | Characters=Characters/Joey_LaRocca,Characters/Paulie_Walnuts,Characters/Salvatore_Bonpensiero,Characters/Silvio_Dante,Characters/Tony_Soprano,Characters/Vito_Spatafore | Concepts= | Objects=Objects/Meat,Objects/Sandwich,Objects/Soft_Drink | Locations=Locations/New_Jersey,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/105/1056167/3631082-satriale.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3631082-satriale.jpg","path":"105\/1056167\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_avatar,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> An Italian deli meat market and hangout for the Soprano crew.

{{Location | Name=Sauna | Guid=3035-8125 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Sauria | Guid=3035-8172 | Deck=Sauria is a fictional planet from the 1990 video game The Adventures of Rad Gravity. A jungle planet, it is inhabited by dinosaur-like creatures. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Sauria is a fictional planet from the 1990 video game The Adventures of Rad Gravity. A jungle planet, it is inhabited by dinosaur-like creatures.

{{Location | Name=Savanna | Guid=3035-8012 | Deck=A grassy woodland ecosystem native from Africa. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Cheetahs,Concepts/Elephants,Concepts/Giraffe,Concepts/Hippopotamus,Concepts/Hyena,Concepts/Lions,Concepts/Monkeys,Concepts/Water_Buffalo,Concepts/Wolf,Concepts/Zebra | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Africa | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3458057-2851872245-800px.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3458057-2851872245-800px.jpg","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A grassy woodland ecosystem native from Africa.

{{Location | Name=Savathûn's Throne World | Guid=3035-7940 | Deck=The Court of Savathûn, also known as the High Coven is the Throne World of Savathûn, the Witch Queen. After she was revived as a Lightbearer, Savathûn reforged most of her realm with the Light instead of Darkness. It became available as as Destination in Destiny 2. | Characters=Characters/Alak_Hul_the_Darkblade,Characters/Fynch,Characters/Immaru,Characters/Rhulk_Disciple_of_the_Witness,Characters/Savathun_the_Witch_Queen | Concepts=Concepts/Female_Antagonists,Concepts/Ghost_12698,Concepts/Hive,Concepts/Insectoid_Humanoid,Concepts/Lucent_Brood,Concepts/Scorn,Concepts/The_Black_Fleet | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439407-2658077047-WQLoc.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439407-2658077047-WQLoc.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_small,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Court of Savathûn, also known as the High Coven is the Throne World of Savathûn, the Witch Queen. After she was revived as a Lightbearer, Savathûn reforged most of her realm with the Light instead of Darkness. It became available as as Destination in Destiny 2.

{{Location | Name=Sequoia National Park | Guid=3035-8026 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Server Room | Guid=3035-8389 | Deck=A server room is a room, usually air-conditioned, devoted to the continuous operation of computer servers. An entire building or station devoted to this purpose is a data center. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Hacking | Objects=Objects/Air_Conditioning_Unit,Objects/Computer | Locations=Locations/Office_Building | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3810023-5754622645-serve.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3810023-5754622645-serve.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A server room is a room, usually air-conditioned, devoted to the continuous operation of computer servers. An entire building or station devoted to this purpose is a data center.

{{Location | Name=Seychelles | Guid=3035-8311 | Deck=Seychelles is the smallest country in Africa. | Characters=Characters/Brian_56366,Characters/Liquid_Snake,Characters/Master_Miller,Characters/Quiet,Characters/Revolver_Ocelot,Characters/Venom_Snake | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Africa,Locations/Ocean | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3647031-flag-seychelles_jpg.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3647031-flag-seychelles_jpg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Seychelles is the smallest country in Africa.

{{Location | Name=Shang Tsung's Lab | Guid=3035-8105 | Deck=Shang Tsung's lab is where the sorcerer claims to hone his magical abilities. In truth, this lab is a facade, for his true and horrifying experiments take place in the Flesh Pits hidden below. | Characters=Characters/Shang_Tsung | Concepts=Concepts/Magic,Concepts/Wizards | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Shang_Tsungs_Flesh_Pits | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3497457-4695815475-F4VLW85bIAA1q6O.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3497457-4695815475-F4VLW85bIAA1q6O.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_small,square_mini,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Shang Tsung's lab is where the sorcerer claims to hone his magical abilities. In truth, this lab is a facade, for his true and horrifying experiments take place in the Flesh Pits hidden below.

{{Location | Name=Sherwood Country Club | Guid=3035-8078 | Deck=Sherwood Country Club is a private country club known for its golf course and celebrity alumni. | Characters=Characters/Caitlyn_Jenner,Characters/Justin_Bieber,Characters/Kim_Kardashian,Characters/Tiger_Woods | Concepts=Concepts/Golf | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Home,Locations/House,Locations/Lake,Locations/Lake_Sherwood,Locations/North_America,Locations/Swimming_Pool,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3486953-getimage.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3486953-getimage.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Sherwood Country Club is a private country club known for its golf course and celebrity alumni.

{{Location | Name=Sierra Leone | Guid=3035-7985 | Deck=Sierra Leone is a republic in Western Africa. Its capital city is Freetown. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Sierra Leone is a republic in Western Africa. Its capital city is Freetown.

{{Location | Name=Sierra Nevada | Guid=3035-8362 | Deck=Sierra Nevada is a range of mountains that primarily exist in California, though some do actually cross into the state of Nevada. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects=Objects/Giant_Redwoods | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Nevada,Locations/New_California_Republic,Locations/North_America,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732382-sierra-nevada-range.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3732382-sierra-nevada-range.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Sierra Nevada is a range of mountains that primarily exist in California, though some do actually cross into the state of Nevada.

{{Location | Name=SimNation | Guid=3035-8135 | Deck=SimNation is the fictional country that all The Sims games take place in. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3537030-the_sims_2_conceptart_sekpr.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3537030-the_sims_2_conceptart_sekpr.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> SimNation is the fictional country that all The Sims games take place in.

{{Location | Name=Sisika Penitentiary | Guid=3035-8334 | Deck=A maximum security prison featured in Red Dead Redemption 2. | Characters=Characters/John_Marston | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Lemoyne,Locations/Prison,Locations/The_United_States_of_America }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> John Marston is arrested after the Saint Denis bank robbery and imprisoned in Sisika Penitentiary. Arthur Morgan and Sadie Adler free him later on.

{{Location | Name=Skatepark | Guid=3035-8304 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Revert,Concepts/Skateboarding | Objects=Objects/Wristband | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Ski Resort | Guid=3035-8420 | Deck=A ski resort is a resort developed for skiing, snowboarding, and other winter sports. In Europe, most ski resorts are towns or villages in or adjacent to a ski area–a mountainous area with pistes (ski trails) and a ski lift system. In North America, it is more common for ski areas to exist well away from towns, so ski resorts usually are destination resorts, often purpose-built and self-contained, where skiing is the main activity. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Alpine_Skiing,Concepts/Cross_country_Skiing,Concepts/Skiing,Concepts/Snow,Concepts/Tourism | Objects=Objects/Ski_Goggles,Objects/Ski_Lift,Objects/Ski_Mask,Objects/Skis | Locations=Locations/Austria,Locations/Europe,Locations/Italy,Locations/Japan,Locations/Mountains,Locations/North_America,Locations/Switzerland,Locations/The_Alps }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> A ski resort is a resort developed for skiing, snowboarding, and other winter sports. In Europe, most ski resorts are towns or villages in or adjacent to a ski area–a mountainous area with pistes (ski trails) and a ski lift system. In North America, it is more common for ski areas to exist well away from towns, so ski resorts usually are destination resorts, often purpose-built and self-contained, where skiing is the main activity.
